'''佐久神社'''（さくじんじゃ）は[[日本]]の[[神社]]。同名の神社が静岡県と山梨県を中心に複数ある。 *[[佐久神社 (甲府市)]] 山梨県甲府市にある神社。 *[[佐久神社 (笛吹市)]] 山梨県笛吹市にある神社。 *[[佐久神社 (静岡市)]] 静岡市清水区にある神社。
== 関連項目 == *[[佐久奈度神社]] 滋賀県大津市にある神社。
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''佐久神社'''（さくじんじゃ）は[[日本]]の[[神社]]。同名の神社が静岡県と山梨県を中心に複数ある。 *[[佐久神社 (甲府市)]] 山梨県甲府市にある神社。[[向山氏]]の[[天文]]13年（[[1543年]]）領主向山出雲守により移転された。 *[[佐久神社 (笛吹市)]] 山梨県笛吹市にある神社。 *[[佐久神社 (静岡市)]] 静岡市清水区にある神社。

{{曖昧さ回避}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Saku Shrine''' (佐久神社) is a Japanese shrine. Several shrines with the same name are located primarily in Shizuoka Prefecture and Yamanashi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Saku Shrine (Kofu)|ja|佐久神社 (甲府市)}} - A shrine located in Kofu City, Yamanashi Prefecture. Relocated by the feudal lord Kōzan Izumo no Kami in the 13th year of Tenbun (1543). * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Fuefuki)|ja|佐久神社 (笛吹市)}} - A shrine located in Fuefuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja|佐久神社 (静岡市)}} - A shrine located in Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sakunado Shrine|ja|佐久奈度神社}} - A shrine located in Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. * {{ill|Ihasaku Shrine|ja|伊波佐久神社}} - A shrine located in Toyama City, Toyama Prefecture.
{{Aimai}}

Relocated by the feudal lord Kōzan Izumo no Kami in the 13th year of Tenbun (1543). * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Fuefuki)|ja|佐久神社 (笛吹市)}} - A shrine located in Fuefuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja|佐久神社 (静岡市)}} - A shrine located in Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture.

{{Aimai}}

Relocated by the feudal lord Kōzan Izumo no Kami in the 13th year of Tenbun (1543). * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Fuefuki)|ja|佐久神社 (笛吹市)}} - A shrine located in Fuefuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja|佐久神社 (静岡市)}} - A shrine located in Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sakunado Shrine|ja|佐久奈度神社}} - A shrine located in Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. * {{ill|Ihasaku Shrine|ja|伊波佐久神社}} - A shrine located in Toyama City, Toyama Prefecture.
{{Aimai}}

Relocated by the feudal lord Kōzan Izumo no Kami in the 13th year of Tenbun (1543). * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Fuefuki)|ja|佐久神社 (笛吹市)}} - A shrine located in Fuefuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja|佐久神社 (静岡市)}} - A shrine located in Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sakunado Shrine|ja|佐久奈度神社}} - A shrine located in Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. * {{ill|Ihasaku Shrine|ja|伊波佐久神社}} - A shrine located in Toyama City, Toyama Prefecture.
{{Aimai}}

5 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:佐久神社 up to rev 101942042
revision.text:
'''佐久神社'''（さくじんじゃ）は[[日本]]の[[神社]]。同名の神社が静岡県と山梨県を中心に複数ある。 * [[佐久神社 (甲府市)]] - 山梨県甲府市にある神社。[[向山氏]]の[[天文 (元号)|天文]]13年（[[1543年]]）領主向山出雲守により移転された。 * [[佐久神社 (笛吹市)]] - 山梨県笛吹市にある神社。 * [[佐久神社 (静岡市)]] - 静岡市清水区にある神社。
== 関連項目 == * [[佐久奈度神社]] - [[滋賀県]][[大津市]]にある神社。 * [[伊波佐久神社]] - [[富山県]][[富山市]]にある神社。
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:佐久神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11382630]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Saku Shrine''' (佐久神社) is a Japanese shrine. Several shrines with the same name are located primarily in Shizuoka Prefecture and Yamanashi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Saku Shrine (Kofu)|ja|佐久神社 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saku Shrine (Kofu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in Kofu City, Yamanashi Prefecture. Relocated by the feudal lord Kōzan Izumo no Kami in the 13th year of Tenbun (1543). * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Fuefuki)|ja|佐久神社 (笛吹市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saku Shrine (Fuefuki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in Fuefuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Saku Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja|佐久神社 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saku Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture. == See Also == * {{ill|Sakunado Shrine|ja|佐久奈度神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakunado Shrine|qq=}} - A shrine located in Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. * {{ill|Ihasaku Shrine|ja|伊波佐久神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ihasaku Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in Toyama City, Toyama Prefecture.
